_publications._publicationTitle: Survival of Human Neurofibroma in Immunodeficient Mice and Initial Results of Therapy With Pirfenidone.

_contextSnippet: Neurofibroma xenotransplants in the ear were stable in appearance and size for twelve months postimplantation ( P = .41 Figure 1b ).
details: Xenotransplants in ear remained stable in appearance and size for 12 months post-implantation (P = .41)
